overview: Simhadri Educational Society Group of Institutions, located in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, is a private educational institution offering undergraduate and postgraduate programs in engineering and management. The institute primarily supports regional-level technical education and participates in consolidated placement drives and local recruitment initiatives.
accreditation: NAAC Accreditation: Not Accredited / Grade Data Not Publicly Listed.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Convenor Quota (Category A): Approximately ₹35,000 – ₹40,000 per year (Total ~₹1.40 Lakhs – ₹1.60 Lakhs for full course). Management Quota (Category B): Fees vary based on branch demand and institutional norms.
Approximately ₹35,000 per year (Total ~₹70,000 for the full course).

placements.totalOffers: Multiple offers through pooled campus drives and regional job melas
placements.companiesVisited: Tech Mahindra, HCL, Infosys, regional software consulting groups
placements.internationalOffers: No publicly listed international placement data

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through state counseling procedures and management quota admissions as per Andhra Pradesh higher education norms.
admissions.importantDates: Follows Andhra Pradesh state counseling schedules for AP EAPCET and AP ICET.

campus.specialNote: Hostel & Mess charges are approximately ₹45,000 – ₹55,000 annually. One-time admission and administrative charges range between ₹5,000 – ₹8,000 along with a refundable caution deposit.

hostel.note: Hostel and mess combined fee for campus or associated nearby accommodations.

contact.address: Simhadhri educational society Narapadu(v), koduru junction, anakapalli to sabbavaram highway, Anakapalli – 531002, Andhra Pradesh

sources.admissions: AP EAPCET / AP ICET counseling norms

scholarships.name: Jagananna Vidya Deevena (JVD)
scholarships.description: Tuition support for qualifying Andhra Pradesh students from lower economic backgrounds.

scholarships.name: Post-Metric Schemes
scholarships.description: Government stipends for eligible SC, ST, BC, and EBC students.

scholarships.name: AICTE Tuition Fee Waiver (TFW)
scholarships.description: Limited merit seats for candidates with family income below ?8 LPA.
